meta.page_title: Never Lose a Letting Enquiry Again — 30-Second Auto Reply for Solo Agents
meta.eyebrow: For solo letting agents managing 20–80 properties who lose inbound leads to faster competitors

hero.headline: Never lose a letting enquiry again — reply in 30 seconds automatically
hero.subheadline: Solo letting agents using this stop losing tenants to faster competitors from day one
hero.microcopy: 30-day money-back guarantee — if you miss a single enquiry, we refund everything

problem.heading: You lose enquiries the moment you step away from your phone
problem.body: Rightmove and Zoopla enquiries sit unanswered for hours while prospects message faster competitors. By the time you see the notification, they've already agreed terms elsewhere. At £1,200 per missed commission, every week without an instant reply costs you 3+ lost deals.

items.title: Personalised replies in 30 seconds
items.body: Every Rightmove and Zoopla enquiry gets an instant, custom response — so prospects feel heard before they shop around.

items.title: Done-for-you Rightmove integration
items.body: No setup headaches — we connect your accounts and handle the technical work so you focus on viewings.

items.title: Built for solo agents, not big agencies
items.body: Purpose-built for agents managing 20–80 properties — no bloat, no overpaying for features you'll never use.

proof.heading: Solo agents recover missed leads within days
proof.quote: I lose enquiries if I'm not glued to my phone. By the time I see it they've gone elsewhere.
proof.body: This resonates across r/LandlordUK and solo agent communities — the winners are those who reply first. Our users see results immediately because every incoming lead now gets a live response, not silence.

offer.heading: Clear pricing. No surprises.
offer.intro: Here's exactly what you get and what it costs.

rows.label: Offer
rows.value: Automatic 30-second enquiry replies + Rightmove/Zoopla integration + 30-day lead recovery audit

rows.label: Includes
rows.value: Unlimited enquiries, personalised responses, integration setup, lead audit, and email support

rows.label: Guarantee
rows.value: Miss a single enquiry in your first 30 days and get a full refund — no questions asked

rows.label: Best for
rows.value: Solo letting agents managing 20–80 properties who want to stop losing tenants to faster replies

items.question: How is this different from LeadPro or PropertyFlow?
items.answer: LeadPro (£99/mo) is built for large agencies with complex workflows — overkill and confusing for solo agents. PropertyFlow (£149/mo) doesn't integrate with Rightmove and requires manual setup. We're £79/mo, Rightmove-native, and designed specifically for your operation.

items.question: Will the replies sound generic or spammy?
items.answer: No. Each reply is personalised to the specific property and prospect enquiry. They read like they came from you because they're tailored to your voice and the details of their interest.

items.question: What if I get a reply wrong or a prospect complains?
items.answer: You stay in control. The automated reply gets the ball rolling and keeps leads warm — you handle the conversation from there. If you miss an enquiry, we refund you. There's zero risk in the first 30 days.

closing.heading: Stop losing £1,200 commissions to slower replies
closing.body: Every week you wait, 3 enquiries go cold. Start recovering leads — and the commissions that follow — today.
closing.microcopy: 30-day guarantee. Cancel anytime. No credit card required to explore.
closing.footer_note: Built for UK solo letting agents. First integration is free.
